text.title: Jenkins Pipeline Patterns Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the jenkins-pipeline-patterns methodology end-to-end.

step.name: audit-current-pipeline
step.input: Existing Jenkinsfile + shared library refs + agent declaration.
step.action: Grep for top-level `node {` (scripted), floating `@Library('lib@main')`, missing `options { timeout }`, `agent any`, and pod templates lacking `requests` / `limits`. Inventory non-Serializable Groovy classes referenced from `vars/`.
step.output: Audit report listing each violated rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

step.name: extract-shared-library
step.input: Common pipeline steps repeated across >3 pipelines.
step.action: Move common logic to `vars/buildApp.groovy`, `vars/deployToK8s.groovy`, `vars/notifySlack.groovy` in a dedicated library repo. Add `src/com/example/` for shared Groovy classes (Serializable). Add `test/` JenkinsPipelineUnit specs. Tag a semver release.
step.decision-gate: If the library cannot be moved out of the app repo, document the blocker and STOP — library-version-pinned cannot be enforced inside a co-located library.

step.name: rewrite-pipeline-declarative
step.action: Convert top-level scripted to Declarative. Replace `script {}` blocks with `when` expressions where possible. Pin `@Library('lib@v1.0.0') _`. Add full `options {}` (timeout + buildDiscarder + disableConcurrentBuilds + timestamps + ansiColor). Wrap every parallel branch in `dir()` or `ws()`.

step.name: harden-kubernetes-pod-template
step.action: For every container set `resources.requests.cpu`, `resources.requests.memory`, `resources.limits.cpu`, `resources.limits.memory`. Restrict `serviceAccountName` to least-privilege. Make `privileged: true` opt-in only for explicit docker:dind containers.

step.name: validate-and-promote
step.input: Jenkinsfile + library tag + pod template + validator.
step.action: Run `validate-jenkins-pipeline-patterns.py --file artefact.json`. Submit Jenkinsfile to the Pipeline Linter REST endpoint. Run the library `JenkinsPipelineUnit` test suite. Merge + tag the library; promote pipelines one shard at a time.
step.output: Pipeline live with all rules enforced.
step.decision-gate: If the linter fails, do not merge — fix the violation first.
